Context: I need to take the agentic ai demo at this link https://github.com/Jlevings/demo-vault-agentic-iam.git and modify it to run locally . 

Tech Stack: 
Terraform OSS local 
Vault Enterprise local
Rancher + nerdctl
Plus any additional packages and dependencies needed 

Role: Devops Specialist, Cloud Architect, Kubernetes Pro

Objective: The user should be able to run the demo-vault-agentic-iam demo locally from their machines. Terraform should be leveraged to deploy the demo along with any other tools or necessary such as helm, argocd, ansible ect. You only need to include the tools necessary do not include additional mentioned tools if they are not needed. The working directory files should include everything needed to run the demo and automation to tear it down. It should have robust documentation such as .md files that provide step by step instructions on how to deploy, test, and tear down the evironment. It should also copy over all of the read.me inforamation covering starting from the "Field Resrouces" section in the README https://github.com/Jlevings/demo-vault-agentic-iam.git . The preference is to be able us Terraform with the option to use Terraform Cloud, and ansible. Include robust commenting in the code base. Explain every function or resource block. It's important for future maintainers that they understand the intent behind every code block. you will also be responsible for testing and validating the demo can be succesfully deployed. 

Tasks: 
Go into planning mode and determine the best plan of action to 
-access the github repository and review the folder structure and contents
-decide the best path to migrate and refactor the current codebase to match the objective above. 
-organize the directory
-decide on tools for the job
-decide on deployment architecture
-build all workflows, code, how to guides, and copy demo field resources 
-any other tasks needed. 

Attached is the vault enterprise license for this demo.
